name: Search
description: Search the web for information, look things up online, research topics. Ask about anything: people, places, facts, current events, technical questions.
author: MUSE
planner_hint: Use as the FIRST step when the goal needs web information and no specific URL is provided. Returns summarized results with source URLs that can be passed to Webpage Reader.

actions.description: Search the web for information on a topic
Set up or change the search API key

credentials.label: Tavily API Key
credentials.help_text: Sign up at tavily.com to get an API key for web search.

credentials.label: Brave Search API Key
credentials.help_text: Get a free API key at brave.com/search/api (2,000 queries/month free).

credentials.label: Bing Search API Key
credentials.help_text: Create a Bing Search v7 resource in the Azure portal (1,000 calls/month free).
